description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a matte black and dark green finish, complemented by metallic accents on the barrel and muzzle. The rifle is equipped with a collapsible stock, a detachable box magazine, and a full-length handguard with rail systems for accessory mounting. A compact optical sight is mounted on the top rail, enhancing aiming capabilities for urban engagements. The barrel is medium-length and fitted with a flash hider at the muzzle, reducing visible muzzle flash. The pistol grip and adjustable stock provide ergonomic handling, while the overall build suggests a robust construction primarily from metal and polymer materials. The rifle's design is optimized for versatility and maneuverability in urban environments.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, detachable magazine, optical sight, and flash hider, finished in matte black and green with metallic accents. Built for ergonomic handling and urban versatility.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle with flash hider and the alignment of the handguard and sight.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the collapsible stock, detachable magazine, optical sight, and full-length handguard.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and pistol grip, with the sight and rail system visible along the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the same features as view 1, with more detail on the handguard and magazine.
